perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a male character in a blue shirt sitting in a room, holding a whiteboard and marker, looking directly at the camera with an expressive face. (2) A female character in a pink patterned top is shown sitting next to him; they both write on their whiteboards and then reveal their answers to the camera. (3) Throughout the video, there are frequent cuts between the couple's reactions, close-ups of the written answers on the boards, and split-screen views showing both of them simultaneously. (4) The characters engage in exaggerated gestures, such as laughing loudly, hiding their faces, and pointing at each other in response to the revealed answers. (5) The setting remains a brightly lit indoor space decorated with newspaper clippings and a large green plant.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat and high-tempo acoustic guitar music starts immediately, accompanying an energetic male voice introducing the game. (2) An off-screen male voice is heard asking a series of questions in a clear, professional tone. (3) The on-screen male and female characters provide verbal responses, often accompanied by loud laughter, cheering sound effects (SFX), and playful banter. (4) Specific SFX like buzzers for mismatches and bell dings for correct or funny moments are used to emphasize the game's progress. (5) The audio remains clear with studio-quality recording, focusing on the high-energy dialogue and the background music.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Subtitles translate the spoken dialogue throughout the video. (2) Decorative/Effect Text: Titles like 'Couple Compatibility Test' and questions like 'When was the last time you turned in homework?' appear in bold, colorful fonts. (3) Hook Text: Emotional stickers and captions such as '(So exciting?!)', '(Boss's stamina is great)', and '(Middle finger of love)' are used to highlight specific humorous or shocking moments.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Repeated cycles of Question, Answer reveal, and Reaction -> Conclusion

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male main creator and 1 female partner appear throughout.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The male character wears a blue short-sleeved outer shirt over a white shirt and white pants. The female character wears a pink/orange floral patterned top and a checkered yellow and white skirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A minimalist studio set with a plain white wall partially covered with newspaper clippings/magazine pages, a large green Monstera plant, and some purple equipment on the floor.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Question -> Simultaneous Reveal -> Reaction Banter -> Repeat
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is designed to entertain a social media audience by showcasing the humorous and intimate dynamic of a popular couple. Through a 'compatibility test' game, it reveals personal anecdotes and secrets, using high-energy editing and reactions to maximize engagement and relatability for viewers interested in lifestyle and relationship content.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The branding 'haha baby' is clearly visible on the chairs and props used by the characters.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Cai Aga's signature high-pitched energetic narration and variety-show style text graphics.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video exemplifies typical Taiwanese YouTube short-form variety content, focusing on personality-driven entertainment and high-density visual/auditory stimulation.
